title: 28 kg ganja seized in Erode; multiple arrests made
summary: Prohibition Enforcement Wing police seized around 28 kg of ganja in operations linked to Erode, including a 10 kg haul at the railway station. Several suspects were arrested and remanded as investigations continue into drug trafficking routes.

title: EVMs secured in strong rooms ahead of May 4 counting
summary: Election officials have moved EVMs and VVPAT machines to highly secured strong rooms across Erode district, with continuous surveillance in place until counting day.

title: Erode braces for rising temperatures above 40°C
summary: Erode continues to experience intense summer heat, with temperatures already crossing 40°C and further rise expected during early May, increasing health risks and heatwave conditions.

title: Two workers killed in construction site accident
summary: Two construction workers lost their lives after a mini lift snapped and fell at a building site in Erode. Authorities have initiated an investigation into safety compliance. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}

title: Two students killed in road accident near Anthiyur
summary: A truck collision involving two motorcycles near Anthiyur claimed the lives of two Class XII students, raising fresh concerns over road safety in the region. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

title: Repeated hoax bomb threats raise security concerns
summary: Erode Collectorate received another hoax bomb threat via email, prompting intensive checks by police and bomb squads. Authorities are investigating the source of repeated false alerts. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

title: Garbage dumping reported in local lake area
summary: Local authorities flagged illegal dumping of waste in a lake near Pachampalayam, raising environmental and public health concerns among residents. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}

title: Final water release phase completed in canal
summary: The last phase of water supply through the Lower Bhavani canal has been halted, intensifying irrigation concerns among farmers in Erode district. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}

title: Two youths arrested with 10 kg ganja
summary: Police arrested two individuals in Erode after seizing 10 kg of ganja, as part of ongoing efforts to curb narcotics trafficking in the region. :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}

title: Temple chariot festival draws large crowds
summary: The Chithirai festival chariot procession at a local temple in Erode witnessed significant public participation, marking a key cultural event in the district. :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}

title: Counting preparations indicate multiple rounds
summary: Officials indicate that vote counting in Erode may span over 170 rounds, reflecting the large electorate and complexity of the counting process. :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7}

title: Foreign nationals sentenced in legal case
summary: A local court sentenced 11 foreign nationals to two years imprisonment in a case related to legal violations in the district. :contentReference[oaicite:8]{index=8}

title: Woman dies in car overturn accident
summary: A fatal accident involving a car overturning in Erode led to the death of a woman, with police investigating the cause of the crash. :contentReference[oaicite:9]{index=9}

title: Heat-related health issues continue to rise
summary: Hospitals in Erode are reporting an increase in heatstroke and dehydration cases as temperatures remain extremely high across the district.

title: Power demand surges amid ongoing heatwave
summary: Electricity consumption has increased significantly in Erode due to continuous use of cooling appliances, with officials monitoring grid stability closely.
